creator: patrick@mindstep.com
text:
Two new patches have been published on the squid site for the 2.3-STABLE4
release of Squid.

Fix: The following patch updates the port's Makefile and md5 file for the 2 new
patches.


Note that PR ports/19797 should be closed since it is no longer applicable.

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
